films.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2
films.description: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.

films.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 + Intro from Ophelia Love
films.description: This screening will be introduced by Ophelia Love.  Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly despera…

films.title: Adults Only: The Devil Wears Prada 2
films.description: This screening is strictly for people aged 18 and over.  Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly de…

films.title: Dog-Friendly: The Devil Wears Prada 2
films.description: This screening's theme is FASHION . We encourage dogs (and owners) to dress up and strut the dogwalk in our bar. There will be a prize for best-dressed dog!  If your dog requires a seat, please book them a Dog seat free of charge. Dogs must be kept on leads at all times in the bar and screening room…

films.title: Premiere: The Slowest Landslide
films.description: Join Fred Roberts at The Arzner for the premiere of The Slowest Landslide - his new music video, followed by a live performance.  Fred Roberts debuts The Slowest Landslide. His first release through AWAL and the opening chapter of a trilogy about one summer. The song draws from the collapse of a nea…

films.title: The Climb: Meningitis Research Foundation Fundraiser
films.description: The Climb is a collection of LGBTQ+ short films that deal with themes of resilience and facing tough challenges. All ticket sales will be donated to Meningitis Research Foundation.  This screening will be hosted by Rebecca Row. Rebecca will be undertaking a Mt. Everest Trek Challenge to raise money …

films.title: Short Com: Laugh Out Proud
films.description: Short Com Presents Laugh Out Proud.  This is a collection of comedy short films made by LGBTQ+ and female filmmakers.  50% of all ticket sales will be donated to Queerwell.  Queerwell are the national community led mental health charity for people aged 18 and over who identify as LGBTQ+. They offer …

films.title: The Christophers
films.description: The estranged children of a once-famous artist hire a forger to complete his unfinished works so they can be "discovered" and sold after his death.

films.title: Queer as Punk
films.description: Being LGBT is criminalised in Muslim-majority Malaysia. Trans man Faris and his punk band still travel the country playing gigs and protesting on the streets. A documentary portrait of courageous people, humorous friendship and the spirit of punk.

films.title: Shrek Party
films.description: This is an adult-only screening to commemorate the 25th anniversary of Shrek. Ticket-holders must be aged 18 or older.  Dress-up is encouraged but not mandatory. There will be goodies for anyone who dresses up, and maybe a prize for best dressed...  A mean lord exiles fairytale creatures to the swam…

films.title: Shrek (25th Anniversary)
films.description: It ain't easy bein' green -- especially if you're a likable (albeit smelly) ogre named Shrek. On a mission to retrieve a gorgeous princess from the clutches of a fire-breathing dragon, Shrek teams up with an unlikely compatriot -- a wisecracking donkey.

films.title: Sunset Boulevard + Intro from Norma Desperate
films.description: This screening will be introduced by Norma Desperate; London's not so silent movie star.  A screenwriter develops a dangerous relationship with a faded film star determined to make a triumphant return.

films.title: LGBTQ+ Shorts & Stand-Up
films.description: Love stand-up? Love cinema? Why choose!  Catch hilarious comedy short films starring or made by stand-up comedians, with performances from the very same actors you'll see on screen. Comedian Caitlin Powell will present three fantastic stand-ups and short films, including  Slag-Offers starring Kate B…

films.title: World Goth Day Double Bill + Goth Drag Intro
films.description: *PLEASE NOTE THAT THIS PEFORMANCE WILL START AT 21:00. THERE WILL BE NO ADS & TRAILERS. DOORS OPEN AT 20:55.  To celebrate World Goth Day, we have an exciting double bill of two beloved goth films.  This screening will be introduced by drag queen Juxta Pose.   The titles will be announced soon…

films.title: Madfabulous
films.description: In the late 19th century, Henry Cyril Paget is the flamboyant fifth Marquess of Anglesey who smashed society’s notions of class, gender and decorum, squandering a multimillion fortune before his heartbreaking untimely death.

films.title: Dog-Friendly: Madfabulous
films.description: This screening's theme is Pride. Wave those rainbow flags! There will be a prize for the most prideful dog...  If your dog requires a seat, please book them a Dog seat free of charge. Dogs must be kept on leads at all times in the bar and screening room.    Treats and care will be generously provide…

films.title: Pink Narcissus (4K Restoration) + Extended Intro
films.description: Celebrate Pride Month with this newly restored piece of queer cinema history!  This screening will begin with a pre - recorded extended introduction from the UCLA Film and Television Archive’s Motion Picture Curator Todd Wiener. The work of artist and photographer James Bidgood, Pink Narcissus is a …

films.title: 10s Across the Borders: Q&A + The Arzner Ball
films.description: This screening and event is in partnership with Haus of Telfar UK.  We will be screening the brand new documentary 10s Across the Borders followed by a Q&A with the director Chan Sze-Wei.  After this screening, we are then clearing out our bar and hosting the very first The Arzner Ball in collaborat…

films.title: Cactus Pears + Director Q&A
films.description: This screening will begin with the short film Two Black Boys in Paradise. The screening will then be followed by an in-person Q&A with director Rohan Kanawade.  Anand, a 30-something city dweller compelled to spend a 10-day mourning period for his father in the rugged countryside of western India, t…

films.title: Stand-Up with Pride: LGBTQ+ Comedy
films.description: The Arzner Presents: Stand-Up with Pride  Stand-Up with Pride is a stand-up comedy night in our cinema with hilarious LGBTQ+ comedians to commemorate Pride Month. This event will be hosted by movie-star Norma Desperate.  Our line-up includes:  Alex Mitchell (Britain's Got Talent, Queers On Podcast &…

films.title: The Powerpuff Girls Movie + Intro from Nyongbella
films.description: This screening will be introduced by Nyongbella (Ru Paul's Drag Race UK, S7).  After destroying the city of Townsville in a game of tag, a trio of superpowered little girls must redeem themselves by stopping a vengeful monkey's plot for world domination.

films.title: brat summer: Charli XCX Marathon
films.description: Celebrate the end of brat summer with a Charli XCX movie marathon.  There will be surprises, music videos, goodies, prizes, and more...  If you're a 365 party girl, then this is an event you DO NOT want to miss!!!
